output: Completed batch 7. Added a typed `TimelineEventBus` and moved the cross-hook coordination off mutable refs: commit now emits `beforeCommit`/`pruneSelection`/`scheduleSave`, persistence emits `saveSuccess`, `useTimelineSave` owns the bus and subscribes save scheduling, and `useTimelineState` subscribes history, render-dirty, and selection-prune listeners. Verification: grep confirms `onSaveSuccessRef`, `onBeforeCommitRef`, `pruneSelectionRef`, and `scheduleSaveRef` are gone from the hooks layer, and the full video-editor Vitest module passed with 23 test files and 82 tests. Checkpoint written to `reigh-app/.megaplan/plans/take-the-video-editor-20260406-0351/execution_batch_7.json`.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added a typed `TimelineEventBus` and migrated the four cross-hook ref bridges to event emission/subscription. `useTimelineCommit` now emits `beforeCommit`, `pruneSelection`, and `scheduleSave`; `useTimelinePersistence` emits `saveSuccess`; `useTimelineSave` owns the bus and subscribes `scheduleSave`; `useTimelineState` subscribes history, render-dirty, and selection-prune listeners from the bus. The old `onSaveSuccessRef`, `onBeforeCommitRef`, `pruneSelectionRef`, and `scheduleSaveRef` symbols are gone from the hooks layer, and the former wiring `useLayoutEffect` blocks were removed from `useTimelineState`, `useTimelineSave`, and the selection prune bridge. Verified by grep checks and by the full `src/tools/video-editor/` Vitest module passing with 23 test files / 82 tests.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. All four ref bridges were replaced by event-bus emissions/subscriptions, and the old wiring `useLayoutEffect` blocks were removed from `useTimelineState`, `useTimelineSave`, and the selection prune bridge.
